info.name: Ham.Live API - Internal Testing Collection
info.description: Collection for testing Ham.Live API endpoints during development. **AUTHENTICATION REQUIRED**: Most endpoints require session cookies. See 'Authentication Setup' folder for manual browser auth instructions. Set `baseUrl` to your deployment (e.g. https://ham.live or http://localhost:3000).

variable.description: Base URL for Ham.Live API (local dev or production)
A valid LiveNet ID from your system
A valid NetProfile ID (used by station/admin/endorse-chat endpoints)
A GetStream chat message ID (for moderation delete)

item.name: 🔐 Authentication Setup

request.description:
⚠️  MANUAL AUTHENTICATION REQUIRED ⚠️

Most Ham.Live API endpoints require authentication. Since Google OAuth requires browser redirects, you must manually obtain session cookies:

🔧 SETUP STEPS:
1. Open your browser and navigate to {{baseUrl}}
2. Click 'Sign in with Google' and complete OAuth flow
3. Open browser Developer Tools (F12)
4. Go to Application/Storage tab → Cookies → {{baseUrl}}
5. Find the session cookie (usually named 'session' or similar)
6. Copy the cookie value
7. In Postman: Go to this collection's Cookies tab
8. Add a cookie for {{baseUrl}} domain with the copied value
9. ✅ Now authenticated requests will work!

💡 Alternative: You can also use magic link auth by requesting /auth/magiclogin, checking your email, and following the link in the same browser where Postman runs.
Send magic link to your email. Then click the link in your browser to get authenticated session cookie. ⚠️ Replace 'your-email@example.com' with your actual email address.

item.description: Authentication setup instructions and magic link alternative

request.description: List all active live nets. This endpoint doesn't require authentication.
Get detailed information about a specific LiveNet. ⚠️ Requires authenticated session cookie. Update {{livenetId}} variable with a real ID from your system.
List all net profiles in the system.
Create a new net profile. ⚠️ Requires authenticated session. Server returns created NetProfile in EndPointResponse.message.

Post a station interaction (signal report, hand raise, etc.) for a net. The final path segment is the NetProfile id (required). Requires an authenticated session with a linked callsign (REQ_CALLSIGN). Returns the updated LiveNetDetails envelope.

Issue a GetStream.io chat token for the net's channel. The final path segment is the NetProfile id. Requires an authenticated session with a linked callsign (REQ_CALLSIGN). Returns token/userId/channel details, or { enabled: false } when chat isn't configured.
Delete a chat message (moderation). Net Control only (level 0).
